ValidationRule.description: INACTIVE (active=false, Lead precedent). LAND close gate: at 6. Closed Won require Per_AWU_Rate__c and Commit_Eligible_Date__c to seed a clean Committed-Spend. Field list provisional pending OQ-009. Activation by Nic via Security and Access.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'LAND', ISPICKVAL(StageName, '6. Closed Won'), OR( ISBLANK(Per_AWU_Rate__c), ISBLANK(Commit_Eligible_Date__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Antes de marcar Closed Won en una oportunidad LAND, completa la Tarifa por AWU (Per_AWU_Rate__c) y la Fecha Elegible de Commit (Commit_Eligible_Date__c). Estos terminos alimentan la oportunidad Committed-Spend.
